title: I.S.A Facility Management
description: The ISA Facility Management Mod lets you create detailed, high-security facilities using modular wall systems and zone-striped blocks. Designed for creative mode, it’s perfect for building containment sites in a mysterious, sci-fi world.
body:
# **🛰️ ISA Facility Management Mod**

**Version:** Beta 0.1.8 • **Game Mode:** Creative • **Status:** In Active Development
**Mod Type:** Building / Facility Design / Lore-Based Worldbuilding



Join our discord: https://discord.gg/UhJF7yc7dx

Direct any emails to me!: isaofficalcorpemail@gmail.com

Feel free to donate: https://buymeacoffee.com/wilburconwell



## **🧬 What is the I.S.A.?**

The **Intelligence and Security Agency (I.S.A.)** is a powerful, secretive organization founded by the fictional nation of Avaria. Tasked with protecting humanity from the unknown, the I.S.A. specializes in the containment, study, and control of **supernatural entities, anomalous artifacts, and extradimensional threats**.

Operating from classified underground installations like **Complex-12**, the I.S.A. is the first and last line of defense against the unnatural. Its many branches include research divisions and tactical response teams, which all work together to oversee the secure holding of dangerous anomalies.

This mod brings the world of the I.S.A. to Minecraft, allowing you to build sprawling high-tech facilities tailored for anomaly containment, covert research, and advanced security systems.



## **🏗️ Current Features**

While in early development, the mod already includes a growing set of custom blocks and utilities designed to help you construct immersive, atmospheric I.S.A. sites.

## **🔧 Build the Perfect Facility:**



**Modular Wall Systems** – Seamlessly connect walls, floors, ceilings, and zones.

**Zone Color Stripes** – Distinguish areas like Medical (Red/White), Storage, Living Quarters, and Labs with intuitive color-coded designs.

**Keycard Access System** – Fully working level-based access with redstone compatibility.

**More to come!**


## **👁️ Upcoming Features**

This mod is actively being developed with many planned additions to bring the I.S.A. universe to life:

✅ **Supernatural Entities** – Custom mobs tied to unique anomalies

✅** Emergency Systems** – Alarms, lockdowns, and breach protocols.

✅** ISA Lore Integration **– In-game documents, datapads, encrypted terminals, and voice logs.


## **⚠️ Gameplay Info**

**Creative Mode Only:** The current alpha version is designed for creative building only. Survival mechanics are possibly planned, but not yet confirmed.

**Best With Mods Like:** SecurityCraft and WorldEdit (for large facility builds).

**Performance:** Lightweight and compatible with most modpacks.



## **🛠️ Feedback & Contribution**

This mod is still in early development, and your feedback is incredibly valuable!

💬 Suggest features, report bugs, or join the I.S.A. worldbuilding by joining our Discord and posting stuff!

We’re especially looking for:

Texture artists
Sound designers
Lore writers
Builders for showcase worlds

## **🔗 Links & Credits**


Mod Lead: Wilbur Conwell
Inspired by: SCP Foundation and other secure facility fiction
